image:image.image:title: AI Price Comparator - Chrome Extension with Gemini AI
image:image.image:caption: A Chrome extension that scrapes e-commerce websites and uses Gemini AI to compare prices and find best deals.

image:image.image:caption: A full-stack dairy management system for tracking customers, dues, transactions and generating reports.
